2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.3.2 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "@iobroker/types" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/pdbjjens/ioBroker.vbus-gw/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/pdbjjens/ioBroker.vbus-gw/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
